changelog_signals.snippet: **(Personal) Customize card size in board view** : When you’re using board view in projects and My tasks, you can now adjust the card size to small, medium, or large. **(Starter) Dynamic “Me” filter for people custom fields and creator field** : In projects, My tasks, and portfolios, you can apply a dynamic filter so you see just the tasks related to yourself. Welcome to the July edition of What’s new in Asana, our monthly product update. 1. [00:05] Grant custom field access across teams. What’s new in Asana for March 2026? [Asana Release Notes November 2025]
**(Personal) Customize card size in board view** : When you’re using board view in projects and My tasks, you can now adjust the card size to small, medium, or large. **(Starter) Dynamic “Me” filter for people custom fields and creator field** : In projects, My tasks, and portfolios, you can apply a dynamic filter so you see just the tasks related to yourself.
